Learn how to read Keepa charts for Amazon FBA product research. This complete 2026 tutorial covers everything from settings to strategy, including what each data point actually means and how to use it to make confident buying decisions.

My Keepa Academy training is used by 7 and 8-figure Amazon sellers to train their sourcing teams. In this video, I'm sharing the same framework I teach them, completely free.

Unlike other Keepa tutorials that just show you what to click, I'll teach you how to THINK about the data so you can analyze any product in about a minute.

WHAT YOU'LL LEARN

0:00 - Why most Keepa tutorials leave you confused
1:07 - Getting Keepa and installing the extension
2:52 - What we're covering (and not covering) in this video
3:21 - Settings walkthrough and my recommended setup
7:46 - Understanding the Keepa graph layout
10:56 - Sales Rank: what it is and why it matters
12:49 - Buy Box price: the price that actually matters
14:48 - New price line and third party FBA triangles
17:10 - Amazon price line and when to compete with Amazon
20:48 - Sub-ranks and the monthly sold line explained
24:00 - Rating count as a velocity indicator
25:30 - New offer count and supply trends
27:00 - Drops: what they mean and what they don't
29:00 - Viewing multiple marketplaces
31:00 - Data freshness and update timing
32:00 - Statistics panel overview
33:30 - Tracking products for price alerts
40:30 - Data tab: product details deep dive
47:00 - Offers tab: analyzing competitor data
50:30 - Buy box statistics explained
53:30 - Variations tab: finding the best size/color
1:02:15 - Example 1: A product I would buy (and why)
1:08:00 - Example 2: A product I would avoid (and why)
1:10:45 - Example 3: Reading seasonal products
1:13:30 - Understanding suppressed buy box listings
1:14:45 - Wrap up and next steps

TOOLS MENTIONED

🛠️ Keepa: https://get.keepa.com/d5f0 ($29 EUR/month)
🛠️ SellerAmp: https://www.selleramp.com/oachallenge
Use code: OAC50 for 50% off your first month or 5% off annual plans!

GO DEEPER WITH OAC+

Want the full Keepa Academy training used by 7 and 8-figure sellers? It's included with OAC+, our private community of 200+ Amazon sellers.

OAC+ includes:
- Full Keepa Academy course
- Sourcing courses and SOPs
- Amazon to Amazon flip leads
- Live coaching and Q&A
- Suspension support

Join OAC+: https://www.oachallenge.com/plus

OA CHALLENGE LIVE - MARCH 2026

Join us for our next live cohort where we build your Amazon business together over 14 days.

Learn more: https://www.oachallenge.com

CONNECT WITH ME

Twitter: @cleartheshelf
Website: cleartheshelf.com

If this tutorial helped you understand Keepa better, drop a comment and let me know what clicked. I read every comment.
